title: Join DeSarge Danceworld for private lessons, group classes, and open dance sessions with up to 72% off

pricing_options.label: Private 50-minute dance lesson for individual or couple with one open dance session
Three private 50-minute dance lessons for individual or couple with three open dance sessions
Five group dance classes for one
Five group dance classes for a couple

highlights_html: Make learning to dance fun and easy with beginner and advanced classes, including wedding choreography as a specialty
highlights_text: Make learning to dance fun and easy with beginner and advanced classes, including wedding choreography as a specialty
about_deal_html:
Looking to learn some new dance moves? This deal has got you covered! Whether you're interested in ballroom or Latin styles like waltz, tango, salsa, and more, there's something for everyone. Plus, there's the added bonus of open-dance sessions on Fridays. So why not get your groove on?

What we offer

This deal includes options like private lessons tailored to individuals or couples, group classes offering variety in dance styles, and open-dance sessions on Fridays. Each option provides unique benefits that cater to different needs while ensuring quality instruction.

  • $25.00 for Private Dance Lesson for Individual or Couple with One Open Dance Session: Perfect for personalized instruction.
  • $29.00 for Five Dance Classes of Any Kind ($60.00 value): Great for those wanting variety.
  • $49.00 for Five Dance Classes of Any Kind For a Couple ($120.00 value): Ideal for couples looking to learn together.
  • $69.00 for Three Private Dance Lessons for Individual or Couple with Three Open Sessions: Get intensive training with additional practice.

Why you should grab the offer

This offer stands out due to the personalized private lessons that focus on timing, technique, and step patterns at a pace suited to each learner's style. Weekly open dance sessions allow students to practice socially while recognizing different dance styles through corresponding music. DeSarge Danceworld also offers medal testing programs that motivate dancers by allowing them to set goals and achieve recognition at various proficiency levels. The specialized wedding choreography service ensures couples shine on their big day with unique routines tailored just for them. Additionally, vibrant community events foster camaraderie among students while experienced instructors provide comprehensive guidance across various dance styles.

faqs.question: What deal options are available for Explore Dance Styles with Private Lessons, Group Classes, and Open Sessions at DeSarge Danceworld?
What dance styles does DeSarge Danceworld teach?
Is DeSarge Danceworld's Explore Dance Styles program suitable for complete beginners with no prior dance experience?
How long is each private lesson in the Explore Dance Styles program at DeSarge Danceworld?
Can couples use the private lesson options at DeSarge Danceworld?
Do couples preparing a wedding first dance take lessons at DeSarge Danceworld?

review_quotes.text: I learned more from Sarge in one hour than I learned in a year at other studios. Dance lessons at DeSarge Danceworld are worth the investment.
review_quotes.author: Guest

review_quotes.text: Let’s just start with that I am a complete beginner. Sarge was patient the whole time and I was able to learn at my own pace. I just had the chance to join a public lesson too and that was really fun as well. With Sarge’s, I feel like my first dance at my wedding will be a success !
review_quotes.author: John

review_quotes.text: DeSarge is absolutely amazing. I have never taken dance classes before and I was very nervous. His dynamic personality made me feel completely comfortable.  It didn't even feel like a dance class. Everyone there was very welcoming and it felt like a big family. I would highly recommend if you are interested in taking a dance class to go here.
review_quotes.author: Glenda

review_quotes.text: My husband and I had our first lesson today with Sarge and had a great time!  Sarge was wonderful to work with—very welcoming and patient and put us at ease as we learned the basic hustle steps.  We had a lot of fun during the lesson and look forward to our next lesson later this week!
review_quotes.author: Cindy

review_quotes.text:
We had such a wonderful time. We never danced before. Other than swaying and trying. 
In the 50 minutes with Sarge he made us feel comfortable,  Had us doing the hustle by the time we left.
Wonderful just wonderful, going back tomorrow for round 2,
Try it Its fun!
review_quotes.author: Diane
